intro.title: Siyakwamukela
intro.body: I-LIpsum Writer iyindawo yokusebenzela yokubhala eyakhiwe ngokuzungeza izikhala — isikhala esisodwa kuwo wonke umsebenzi, isihloko noma incwadi. Asibhekise ngokushesha.

continue.title: Qhubeka lapho ushiye khona
continue.body: Isikhala sakho sakamuva esihlelwa sikhona lapha. Ukuchofoza okukodwa kuyasivula futhi.

startSpace.title: Qala okuthile okusha
startSpace.body: Yenza isikhala esisha kusukela kuthempulethi — i-thesis, inoveli, indaba — futhi uqale ukubhala emasekhondini.

writer.title: Indawo yomsebenzi yombhali
writer.description: Uhambo lwesihleli, ibha eseceleni nebha engenhla.

intro.title: Indawo yokubhala
intro.body: Lapha wenza umsebenzi. Asibheke ukuzulazula, amamodi nezinsiza ozozisebenzisa kakhulu.

spaceTitle.title: Isihloko sesikhala
spaceTitle.body: Chofoza isihloko ukuze uqambe kabusha igama lesikhala. Isithonjana esiseduze sivula izilungiselelo zaso.

sections.title: Izigaba namadokhumenti
sections.body: Hlanganisa isikhala ezigabeni, nezigaba ezo emadokhumenti. Beka phezu kwesigaba ukungeza idokhumenti.

settings.title: Izilungiselelo zesikhala
settings.body: Phatha ithempulethi, izigaba, ukwabelana nokususa lesi sikhala.

modes.title: Funda · Bhala · Hlukanisa
modes.body: Shintsha phakathi kokuhlela, ukufunda noma ukubuka eduze nawe. Idokhumenti ngalinye likhumbula imodi yalo yokugcina.

citations.title: Izicaphuno
citations.body: Vula iphaneli yezicaphuno ukuze ufake izinkomba ngenkathi ubhala.

theme.title: Itimu
theme.body: Okukhanyayo, okumnyama nokuhlukile okuphezulu — khetha okufanele amehlo akho.

editor.title: Umhleli
editor.body: Umhleli wombhalo ocebile onezinqamuleli ze-Markdown, amabhulokhi ekhodi nezicaphuno. Qala ukuthayipha — umsebenzi wakho ulondolozwa ngokuzenzakalelayo endaweni.

intro.title: Ibhibhulografi yakho
intro.body: Zonke izinkomba zesikhala zihlala lapha. Ngenisa ifayela le-BibTeX noma ngeza amangenelo ngezandla.

add.title: Ngeza noma ngenisa
add.body: Yehlisa ifayela le-.bib noma namathisela umbhalo we-BibTeX. Izitebhuli ziyeqelwa ngokuzenzakalelayo.

list.title: Uhlu
list.body: Sesha, hlola futhi uhlele izicaphuno ngaphakathi. Lapha futhi ungakhipha ibhibhulografi ephelele.

intro.title: Cabanga kanzima
intro.body: I-BrainSpace iyikhanvasi ekhululekile yemibono — yehlisa amanothi, uwaxhume futhi ulungiselele ukucabanga kwakho ngaphambi kokuya enkulumeni.

addNote.title: Engeza inothi
addNote.body: Yehlisa inothi noma yiluphi uhlobo ekhanvasini. Donsa ukuze ukuhambise, shintsha usayizi kusukela emagumbini.

canvas.title: Ikhanvasi
canvas.body: Shift+chofoza amanothi amabili ukuwaxhuma. Chofoza ngemuva ukuze ukhulule ukukhetha.
